source_title: NTSB Aviation Investigation Final Report WPR17LA096 (Piper PA-32-260, Mukilteo, WA)
document_type: NTSB general-aviation accident final report with probable-cause determination
primary_pressure: One in-flight physical finding (rich-mixture signature) anchors the stuck-float probable cause; carburetor icing is a genuinely supported alternative held back by a single fact.
notes: Stuck-float cause rests on the rich-mixture in-flight signature (witness exhaust + carbon-fouled plugs). Remove that row and the carburetor defects only show capability, not causation, while conducive icing conditions remain supported.
